summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PRIBEGA V3 restructure - all major features working successfully. Homepage hero, Why section, services, portfolio marquee, reviews, Instagram grid, Academy page with videos/form, navigation, contact form, and quiz 4-step flow all functional.

design_issues.issue: Small tagline text 'PRIVATE BROW & LASH STUDIO' visible in hero section
design_issues.description: Requirements specified NO small tagline text, but subtitle is present

passed_tests: Backend API root endpoint (200 OK)
Contact form submission API (POST /api/contact)
Quiz submission API (POST /api/quiz)
Admin endpoints (GET /contacts, /quiz-results)
Homepage hero video loads with PRIBEGA title
Why PRIBEGA section with [ПОЧЕМУ МЫ] and 3 counter animations (7+, 1000+, 1)
Full services list with 4 categories (Брови, Ресницы, Комплекс, Дополнительно)
Portfolio marquee with 28 images and 6 videos scrolling
Reviews section with 3 client reviews and 15 stars
Instagram section with 8 photos grid and Instagram link
PRIBEGA ACADEMY button navigation to /academy page
Academy page with 3 training videos loaded
Academy page program checklist and details
Academy application form submission with success message
Navigation to all pages including /quiz
Language toggle RU/EN functionality
Contact page form submission with success message
Quiz 4-step flow end-to-end completion
Google Maps iframe integration
Social media links (Instagram, TikTok)
